title: SelectionSpec singleton leaks state between two concurrent Matisse pickers
body: SelectionSpec.getInstance() is a process-wide singleton reset via getCleanInstance(). If a Fragment launches Matisse.from(fragment) while a previous MatisseActivity from another Fragment hasn't finished (e.g. multi-pane tablet UI), the second choose() call resets fields like maxSelectable and filters out from under the first picker's still-open UI.

title: Add a Coil-based ImageEngine implementation
body: Right now only GlideEngine and PicassoEngine ship under engine/impl. Our app already depends on Coil for everything else and pulling in Glide just for Matisse feels heavy -- could a CoilEngine implementing ImageEngine be added, or at least documented as something consumers can implement themselves?

title: No example of limiting the 'original photo' size
body: SelectionSpec.originalMaxSize defaults to Integer.MAX_VALUE and there's no sample showing how to set a lower cap through SelectionCreator so users can't send huge 20MB 'original' images over a slow connection. Could the README or sample app show this?

title: singleSelectionModeEnabled() is confusing with countable + per-type maxima
body: singleSelectionModeEnabled() returns true only when maxSelectable == 1 OR both maxImageSelectable == 1 and maxVideoSelectable == 1, but countable also has to be false. Setting countable(true) with maxImageSelectable(1) silently drops out of single-selection mode with no warning, which cost us a day debugging a grid that showed checkboxes instead of radio buttons.
